description: Migration: Add `reports_to` nullable UUID column to `users` table with FK to `users(user_id)`
Migration: Auto-seed `reports_to` from existing team_members/teams data (team member → team manager_id, skip self-references)
Server-side cycle prevention: validate that setting `reports_to` does not create a circular chain
Update `IUser` interface to include optional `reports_to` field
User edit form: Add 'Reports To' dropdown field showing all users in tenant (behind `teams-v2` flag)
User edit form: Saving 'Reports To' persists the value and triggers cycle validation
User edit form: 'Reports To' dropdown is hidden when `teams-v2` flag is off
Org chart: Tree view tab in User Management displaying reporting hierarchy (behind `teams-v2` flag)
Org chart: Users with `reports_to = NULL` shown as top-level nodes
Org chart: Hidden when `teams-v2` flag is off
Implement `isInReportsToChain(managerUserId, employeeUserId)` function using iterative/CTE approach (no recursion stack overflow)
Extend `canApprove` / delegation auth: add `reports_to` chain check alongside existing team-manager check (flag-gated)
Existing `isManagerOfSubject()` team-based check remains active and unchanged regardless of flag
Update `fetchTimeSheetsForApproval()` to additionally include timesheets from `reports_to` subordinates when flag is on
Update AvailabilitySettings to additionally scope managed users by `reports_to` when flag is on
Update SchedulePage to additionally scope managed users by `reports_to` when flag is on
Migration: Add `role TEXT DEFAULT 'member'` column to `team_members` table
Migration: Set `role = 'lead'` for existing team members whose user_id matches their team's `manager_id`
Update `ITeamMember` / team member interfaces to include `role: 'member' | 'lead'`
Migration: Add nullable `assigned_team_id UUID` column to `tickets` table with FK to `teams(team_id)`
Migration: Add nullable `assigned_team_id UUID` column to `project_tasks` table with FK to `teams(team_id)`
Update `ITicket` interface to include optional `assigned_team_id`
Update `IProjectTask` interface to include optional `assigned_team_id`
Server action `assignTeamToTicket()`: sets `assigned_team_id`, assigns lead as primary if `assigned_to` is NULL, expands other members into `ticket_resources` with `role = 'team_member'`
Team assignment: when `assigned_to` is already set, add all team members as resources EXCEPT whoever is already `assigned_to`
Team assignment: team lead is NOT added as `ticket_resources` when they are the primary assignee (respects DB constraint)
Server action `assignTeamToProjectTask()`: same logic as ticket team assignment but for project tasks
Build `UserAndTeamPicker` component: shows users and teams in grouped sections with separator
`UserAndTeamPicker`: typing filters both users and teams simultaneously
`UserAndTeamPicker`: teams show member count and lead name for context
`UserAndTeamPicker`: visual distinction — generic team icon for teams vs user avatar for individuals
`UserAndTeamPicker`: selecting a team triggers team assignment action (sets `assigned_team_id`, assigns lead, expands members)
`UserAndTeamPicker`: selecting a user works identically to existing `UserPicker` behavior
Feature flag swap: ticket detail renders `UserAndTeamPicker` instead of `UserPicker` when `teams-v2` flag is on
Feature flag swap: task detail renders `UserAndTeamPicker` instead of `UserPicker` when `teams-v2` flag is on
When flag is off, existing `UserPicker` renders unchanged (zero risk)
Team badge on 'Agent team' card: chip with generic team icon + team name + x button, matching Additional Agents chip style
Team badge is hidden when `teams-v2` flag is off (even if `assigned_team_id` has a value)
Team removal: clicking 'x' on team badge opens confirmation dialog
Team removal dialog: 'Remove all team members' option removes `ticket_resources` with `role = 'team_member'` and clears `assigned_team_id`
Team removal dialog: 'Keep all team members as individual agents' option clears `assigned_team_id` only, resources stay
Team removal dialog: individual checkboxes for each team member to select who to keep/remove
Team removal: primary `assigned_to` is never automatically removed when clearing team assignment
Adding/removing individual agents does NOT affect team assignment — team badge and agent chips are independent
Team assignment is a snapshot — later team roster changes do not update existing ticket resources
'Assigned To' filter in ticket list: shows teams alongside users when `teams-v2` flag is on
'Assigned To' filter: selecting a team filters by `tickets.assigned_team_id`
'Assigned To' filter: works exactly as before (users only) when flag is off
Extend `tickets.create` workflow action to support `assignee: { type: 'team', id: uuid }` matching `projects.create_task` pattern
Update tenant export to include `reports_to`, `assigned_team_id`, and `role` columns
